care.summary: Striking pink-cream-green leaves; wants humidity and steady moisture without sogginess.
care.light: Bright indirect; avoid harsh midday sun
care.water: Keep evenly moist; never bone dry for long
care.soil: Airy, moisture-retentive mix with orchid bark
common_issues: Root rot if left wet and cold
tips: Group with other plants or use a tray of pebbles
Wipe leaves for best color display
Rotate pot weekly for even growth
